name: U.A. Rival Rebounder
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｕ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウルトラアスリート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コリバルリバウンダー
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Rival Rebounder". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Rival Rebounder" once per turn this way. If this card is Special Summoned during your opponent's turn, or Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "U.A." monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "U.A. Rival Rebounder". You can only use this effect of "U.A. Rival Rebounder" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Rival Rebounder". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Rival Rebounder" once per turn this way. If this card is Special Summoned during your opponent's turn, or Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "U.A." monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "U.A. Rival Rebounder". You can only use this effect of "U.A. Rival Rebounder" once per turn.

action: Returns from field to hand for Special Summon
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
